slices.name: is_ignored_dir
slices.code:
24 | def is_ignored_dir(dirname: str, ignore_dirs: List[str]) -> bool:
  25 |     dirname_lower = dirname.lower()
  26 |     return any(dirname_lower == candidate.lower() for candidate in ignore_dirs)

slices.name: is_binary_file
slices.code:
29 | def is_binary_file(filepath: str, ignore_exts: List[str] = DEFAULT_IGNORE_EXTENSIONS, scan_bytes: int = 2048) -> bool:
  30 |     if any(filepath.lower().endswith(ext) for ext in ignore_exts):
  31 |         return True
  32 | 
  33 |     try:
  34 |         with open(filepath, "rb") as handle:
  35 |             chunk = handle.read(scan_bytes)
  36 |         if not chunk:
  37 |             return False
  38 |         if b"\x00" in chunk:
  39 |             return True
  40 | 
  41 |         guess, _ = mimetypes.guess_type(filepath)
  42 |         if guess and not guess.startswith(("text", "application")):
  43 |             return True
  44 | 
  45 |         text_chars = bytearray({7, 8, 9, 10, 12, 13, 27} | set(range(0x20, 0x7F)))
  46 |         nontext = sum(byte not in text_chars for byte in chunk)
  47 |         return (nontext / len(chunk)) > 0.40
  48 |     except Exception:
  49 |         return True

slices.name: calculate_entropy
slices.code:
52 | def calculate_entropy(text: str) -> float:
  53 |     if not text:
  54 |         return 0.0
  55 |     entropy = 0.0
  56 |     for idx in range(256):
  57 |         char = chr(idx)
  58 |         count = text.count(char)
  59 |         if count == 0:
  60 |             continue
  61 |         p_x = count / len(text)
  62 |         entropy -= p_x * math.log(p_x, 2)
  63 |     return entropy

slices.name: sanitize_content
slices.code:
66 | def sanitize_content(content: str) -> str:
  67 |     for pattern in SENSITIVE_PATTERNS:
  68 |         content = pattern.sub("[REDACTED_SENSITIVE_PATTERN]", content)
  69 | 
  70 |     sanitized_lines: List[str] = []
  71 |     for line in content.splitlines():
  72 |         lower_line = line.lower()
  73 |         if any(keyword in lower_line for keyword in ["api", "key", "secret", "token", "auth", "password"]):
  74 |             if calculate_entropy(line) > 4.5:
  75 |                 parts = line.split("=", 1)
  76 |                 prefix = parts[0] if len(parts) == 2 else line.split(":", 1)[0]
  77 |                 sanitized_lines.append(f"{prefix}= [REDACTED_HIGH_ENTROPY]")
  78 |                 continue
  79 |         sanitized_lines.append(line)
  80 |     return "\n".join(sanitized_lines)

slices.name: compute_file_fingerprint
slices.code:
83 | def compute_file_fingerprint(filepath: pathlib.Path, hash_size: int = 8192) -> Dict[str, str]:
  84 |     sha1_hash = hashlib.sha1()
  85 |     size_bytes = 0
  86 | 
  87 |     with open(filepath, "rb") as handle:
  88 |         while True:
  89 |             chunk = handle.read(hash_size)
  90 |             if not chunk:
  91 |                 break
  92 |             sha1_hash.update(chunk)
  93 |             size_bytes += len(chunk)
  94 | 
  95 |     mtime = filepath.stat().st_mtime
  96 |     return {
  97 |         "sha1": sha1_hash.hexdigest(),
  98 |         "mtime_iso": datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(mtime).isoformat(),
  99 |         "size_bytes": str(size_bytes),
 100 |     }
